page: Amazon Web Services g4ad.4xlarge is a graphics-focused instance powered by the Nitro hypervisor. It features an AMD EPYC 7R32 processor with 16 vCPUs and 8 physical cores running at 3.0 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The hardware configuration includes 64.0 GB of DDR4 memory, a dedicated AMD Radeon Pro Navi V520 GPU with 8 GB of VRAM, and 600 GB of local NVMe SSD instance storage. Network connectivity is provisioned at an 8 Gbps baseline bandwidth.

Benchmark evaluations indicate a mix of average and weak performance profiles. Single-core CPU performance under stress-ng is poor, landing in the bottom 10%, though multi-core CPU performance scales to average levels. Memory bandwidth tests reveal a bottleneck, with large-block read and write operations performing weakly in the bottom 25%, whereas small-block cached reads maintain average throughput. Geekbench scores for single-core, multi-core, ray tracing, and image processing consistently rank in the middle 50%. For language model workloads, prompt processing with a medium 7B model is weak, but text generation remains average.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the g4ad.4xlarge offers a balanced resource density by bundling dedicated AMD graphics acceleration and high-speed local NVMe storage within a single virtualized environment. This integration reduces the need for external storage attachments for data-intensive tasks. The instance is suited for workloads such as graphics-intensive applications, moderate database operations, software compilation, and basic large language model inference.
description: Amazon Web Services g4ad.4xlarge is an x86_64 graphics-focused instance featuring an AMD EPYC 7R32 processor with 16 vCPUs, 64.0 GB of DDR4 memory, and a dedicated AMD Radeon Pro Navi V520 GPU with 8 GB of VRAM. It includes 600 GB of local NVMe SSD storage and operates on the Nitro hypervisor with an 8 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Performance benchmarks show average multi-core CPU and graphics capabilities, though single-core stress-ng performance is poor and large-block memory bandwidth is weak. The bundled GPU and local NVMe storage provide qualitative cost efficiency for resource-dense workloads. This instance is suitable for graphics-intensive applications, software compilation, database operations, and moderate machine learning inference.
og_description: Amazon Web Services g4ad.4xlarge is an x86_64 instance featuring 16 vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, a dedicated AMD Radeon Pro Navi V520 GPU, and 600 GB of NVMe SSD storage for graphics and database workloads.

tagline: An AMD-powered instance featuring dedicated graphics acceleration and local NVMe storage for balanced compute and visualization workloads.

Dedicated AMD Radeon Pro Navi V520 GPU with 8 GB VRAM
600 GB of local NVMe SSD instance storage
8 Gbps baseline network bandwidth on the Nitro hypervisor
